body:
## Purpose 
update dependencies:
```
  [29b5916a] ↑ ClimaAnalysis v0.5.12 ⇒ v0.5.13
  [b2c96348] ↑ ClimaAtmos v0.28.5 ⇒ v0.28.6
  [08f4d4ce] ↑ ClimaLand v0.15.9 ⇒ v0.15.10
  [5c42b081] ↑ ClimaParams v0.10.19 ⇒ v0.10.21
  [b3f4f4ca] ↑ ClimaUtilities v0.1.22 ⇒ v0.1.23
  [0bca4576] ↑ SciMLBase v2.75.0 ⇒ v2.75.1
  [90137ffa] ↑ StaticArrays v1.9.12 ⇒ v1.9.13
  [ddb6d928] ↑ YAML v0.4.12 ⇒ v0.4.13
```

Also includes this change for ClimaLand compatibility:
We renamed a function in ClimaLand that ClimaCoupler uses. This PR changes the name in ClimaCoupler.
title: update dependencies
